---
name: Feature request
about: Propose improvements for the workflow skill, docs, or release experience.
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary / 需求概述
Describe the proposed improvement in one short paragraph.

请用一小段说明你希望增加或改进什么。

## Why This Belongs Here / 为什么应该在本仓库做
Explain why this belongs in the workflow layer rather than directly in upstream OpenSpec or superpowers.

说明这件事为什么应该放在本工作流层，而不是直接改上游 OpenSpec 或 superpowers。

## Proposed Change / 建议方案
Outline the doc, workflow, template, or automation changes you expect.

请概述你期待的文档、工作流、模板或自动化改动。

## References / 参考资料
Link to any relevant file, issue, release note, or upstream discussion.

请附上相关文件、issue、release note 或上游讨论链接。
